lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in mint condition. The engine and transmission are in perfect working order. The exterior is flawless with no scratches, dents, or paint issues. The interior is in factory condition with no signs of wear.

The vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has visible scratches and several small dents. The interior shows noticeable wear and tear from regular use. All mechanical systems are operational, though some maintenance may be required soon.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require extensive repairs to be safely driven. The engine has a severe oil leak and an audible knocking sound, while the transmission slips significantly between gears. Cosmetically, there is noticeable rust on the body panels and the interior upholstery is heavily worn and torn. This car is being sold as-is and would best serve as a project vehicle or for parts.

Get ready to hit the road in this fantastic and reliable ride! It is in good condition and has been well-maintained, offering a smooth driving experience and a very clean appearance. While it shows a few minor signs of careful previous use, it remains a solid, dependable vehicle that's ready for its next owner to enjoy!
Poor condition.

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold strictly as-is for parts or as a major restoration project. It is currently not roadworthy and will require significant mechanical attention, including a likely engine overhaul and transmission repair, before it can safely return to the road. The exterior exhibits extensive rust, particularly along the frame and wheel wells, and the paint is severely weathered. Inside, the interior shows heavy wear with significant tearing in the upholstery and several non-functional electrical components. This car will need to be towed and is best suited for a buyer with mechanical expertise.

We are proud to present this superlative vehicle, maintained to an exacting standard that mirrors its original showroom delivery. This specimen exhibits an immaculate exterior finish paired with an interior of pristine, untouched quality. Mechanically beyond reproach and aesthetically flawless, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation for the discerning collector. A rare acquisition for those who demand uncompromising excellence.

Hey there! I'm selling my absolute pride and joy, and let me tell you, she is a total dream! This car has been babied since day one—always garage-kept and meticulously cared for. It’s in truly flawless condition, looking and driving just like it's brand new. You won’t find a single scratch or blemish anywhere! I'm looking for someone who will appreciate such a pristine, showroom-quality ride. Feel free to message me if you want to come take a look!

This investment-grade E46 M3 features the legendary S54B32 inline-six, delivering linear power through individual throttle bodies. The high-revving internals are protected by a documented VANOS overhaul and rod bearing replacement. Power is managed by a crisp Getrag 420G 6-speed manual and a factory limited-slip differential, while the chassis has been structurally optimized with subframe reinforcement. Riding on a refreshed suspension with Bilstein dampers, this example maintains perfect kinematic alignment and factory-spec torsional rigidity. A turn-key mechanical marvel for the purist.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. Full service records. No accidents. Inspection ready.

Presenting a truly exceptional vehicle that defines 'mint condition.' This car has been meticulously garaged and climate-controlled, preserving its factory-fresh luster. The exterior features a deep, mirror-like finish with zero imperfections—no rock chips, door dings, or swirl marks. Inside, the cabin remains in showroom state; the premium upholstery shows no signs of wear, and every electronic component functions exactly as it did the day it left the assembly line. Mechanically, it is flawless, backed by a comprehensive service portfolio documenting its pampered history. This is a rare opportunity to own a collector-grade example that drives as perfectly as it looks.

Presenting an automotive specimen of uncompromising caliber. This vehicle has been maintained to an exacting standard, preserving its showroom-original integrity both mechanically and aesthetically. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection, this acquisition represents the pinnacle of its class, offering a rare opportunity to secure a vehicle in truly pristine condition.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained in truly pristine condition. This specimen offers an unparalleled driving experience for the discerning collector. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the meticulously preserved interior, reflects a standard of care that is increasingly rare. It represents a premier opportunity to acquire a vehicle of showroom caliber.

Hey everyone! I’m finally parting with my absolute pride and joy. This car is in stunning condition—honestly, it still looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve babied this beauty from day one, so it’s spotless inside and out and drives like an absolute dream. If you’re looking for something that’s been meticulously cared for and is ready for its next adventure, this is the one for you. Come say hi and take a look, you're going to fall in love!

This E46 M3 is a museum-grade example of Bavarian engineering. Under the hood, the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six features a 11.5:1 compression ratio and six independent throttle bodies, delivering linear power up to an 8,000 RPM redline. The Getrag 420G six-speed manual transmission provides tactile, short-throw shifts, while the M-Variable Differential Lock ensures optimal torque distribution across the rear axle. This vehicle boasts a completely reinforced rear subframe and a meticulously maintained VANOS system, addressing all platform-specific concerns. The chassis remains exceptionally rigid with zero oxidation. Draped in original Carbon Black Metallic paint with a flawless Laguna Seca Blue interior, this specimen retains its factory-spec
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No mechanical issues. Clean title.

Presenting an absolute gem: a meticulously maintained vehicle that truly defines 'showroom condition.' This car has been garage-kept since day one, and it shows. The exterior paint retains its deep, factory-fresh luster without a single swirl mark or stone chip in sight. Step inside to an interior that still carries that new-car scent; the premium leather upholstery is supple and free of any wear, creases, or blemishes. Mechanically, this vehicle is flawless, having undergone every scheduled service at authorized dealerships with a fully documented history to prove it. Every button, sensor, and feature functions exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line. With exceptionally low mileage and a history of adult ownership, this is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle that looks and drives like it just left the showroom floor. Serious inquiries only for this pristine example of automotive excellence.

Presented for your consideration is an automotive specimen of peerless distinction. This vehicle remains in an immaculate, showroom-state condition, reflecting a legacy of fastidious preservation and uncompromising maintenance. Every surface and mechanical component adheres to the highest standards of excellence, offering an ownership experience indistinguishable from new. We invite the discerning collector or enthusiast to acquire this benchmark of engineering integrity.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in pristine, showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting a history of meticulous stewardship. A rare acquisition for the discerning collector who demands nothing less than absolute perfection.

Hi friends! 🚗 I'm so excited to share this absolute gem with you! If you’re looking for a ride that feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor, you’ve found it. This beauty is in truly mint condition—I’ve babied it since day one, and it honestly shows. It drives like a dream and looks even better in person! Perfect for someone who wants that brand-new feel without the brand-new price tag. Come say hi and take it for a spin!

Offering a collector-grade E46 M3 in pristine condition. This example features the iconic S54 3.2L inline-six engine with individual throttle bodies and a high-pressure double-VANOS system, delivering a linear power band up to an 8,000 RPM redline
Mint condition. Garage kept. Service records included. No accidents. Clean title.

Presenting an absolute masterpiece for the discerning collector or enthusiast. This vehicle is in pristine, showroom-level condition, having been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled garage since day one. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with zero imperfections, scratches, or stone chips, protected by a premium multi-layer ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin remains in an untouched state; the high-grade leather is supple with no creasing on the bolsters, and the original factory carpets are flawless. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, featuring a comprehensive service history performed exclusively by certified master technicians. Every button, switch, and electronic feature operates with the precision of a new vehicle. With exceptionally low mileage and a documented pedigree of preventative care, this is quite simply the finest example of this model available on the market today. It offers a rare opportunity to own a vehicle that looks, feels, and drives exactly as it did the day it was delivered.

Presented in impeccable showroom condition, this vehicle represents the absolute pinnacle of automotive preservation. Every aspect, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, reflects a standard of care that satisfies the most discerning collector. This is an exceptional opportunity to acquire a truly investment-grade example, maintained without compromise and ready for immediate delivery to a fastidious new owner.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This specimen showcases a flawless exterior finish complemented by an interior that remains in showroom state. With meticulous mechanical stewardship and exhaustive service records, this offering represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector who demands nothing less than perfection.

Hey there! You honestly have to see this beauty to believe it! It’s in absolutely pristine, showroom condition—it literally looks and drives like it just rolled off the lot. I’ve taken such good care of it, and I’m so excited for its next owner to enjoy it as much as I have. It’s a total gem and ready for its new home!

This E92 M3 is a museum-grade example featuring the legendary S65 4.0L V8, delivering 414 hp with an 8,400 RPM redline. The individual throttle bodies and double-VANOS system function with surgical precision. Meticulously maintained, the chassis retains its factory rigidity, complemented by Electronic Damper Control and a lightning-fast M-DCT gearbox. Every component, from the limited-slip differential to the carbon-fiber roof, remains in showroom state. Zero mechanical compromises—just pure, high-revving performance.
Pristine condition. No scratches or dents. Garage kept. Full service history. Runs perfectly.

Step into a time capsule with this absolute masterpiece of automotive engineering. This vehicle is in breathtaking, showroom-ready condition, having been meticulously pampered by a single enthusiast owner since its original purchase. The exterior features a deep, mirror-like finish without a single stone chip, swirl mark, or parking lot blemish. Inside, the cabin is a sanctuary of untouched luxury; the premium upholstery shows no signs of use, the dashboard is crack-free, and every electronic component functions with factory precision. Under the hood, the engine bay is remarkably clean, reflecting a rigorous maintenance schedule performed exclusively by master technicians using OEM parts. With incredibly low mileage and a documented history of being stored in a climate-controlled environment under a soft cover, this car offers a driving experience that is indistinguishable from new. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a preserved, collector-grade example that satisfies even the most discerning eye.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive preservation. This unit exhibits a showroom-grade exterior finish and an interior that remains indistinguishable from new. Mechanically absolute and aesthetically flawless, this offering represents a premier opportunity for the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection.
